title: Codiaeum trilobum

It belongs to the genus Codiaeum, which includes a range of shrub-like plants native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The species is a part of the order Malpighiales, which comprises over 16,000 species of flowering plants. Within the family Euphorbiaceae, Codiaeum trilobum is closely related to other species such as Codiaeum variegatum, which is a popular ornamental plant. The classification of Codiaeum trilobum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
